subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to analyze budget allocation by product category, calculate spend, variance, and cost trends (month-over-month or period-over-period growth rates)

Analyze budget analysis results to identify underperforming vs high-performing categories, assess cost trend patterns, and generate data-driven reallocation strategy recommendations with priority scoring

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks needed: (1) sql_gen at mid tier to perform multi-table aggregation across budget, product, and cost data with trend calculations (month-over-month, variance analysis) — not frontier-level complexity but requires joins and window functions. (2) cross_recon at mid tier to synthesize the SQL output into strategic recommendations with category performance classification and reallocation prioritization — this is analytical synthesis of a single data source (SQL output), not true cross-source reconciliation, but cross_recon is the right agent for generating strategic recommendations from analytical results. No separate policy_action needed; reallocation strategy is a business decision, not a governance/compliance policy check.

output.sql: SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS prev_period_spend, SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS spend_variance, ROUND(CASE WHEN LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) IS NULL OR LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter)) / LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) * 100 END, 2) AS pct_growth, AVG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_4q_avg_spend, SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS total_portfolio_spend_period, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter), 0) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_total_budget FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, total_spend DESC

output.raw_output:
